data.body: Done definition update: Add — 'When this story is complete, test (c) verifies that ref-library-loader.sh is called with task-description input and produces at least one annotated task in the correct citation format — covering the script's external interface, not only its output format. The E2E path (implementation-plan SKILL.md invoking ref-library-loader.sh) is documented as requiring a behavioral integration test within Story E; Story A covers the script-level contract.' (taxonomy: ordering_and_sequencing)
